title: Dagga Marl
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Dagga Marl |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Cobalt-blue |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Ylesian Republic]] *[[Peace Brigade]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Dagga Marl''' was the [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] of [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] during his brief time as [[President of Ylesia|President]] of the [[Ylesian Republic]]. Sal-Solo chose her for her skill—something his [[Ylesian Presidential Guard|official guard]] lacked in abundance—and her [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] nature. ==Biography== In exchange for one kilogram of [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]]—which had virtually replaced other currency on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]—every week, plus a bonus if he required her to kill someone, Marl kept a close eye on Sal-Solo, which she considered a challenge. Earlier in her career, she had worked as an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] for the Ylesian Senate, and as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' ===Capture=== {{Quote|''Farglblag?"
"''Sorry.''"
"''How do you ''spell'' it?|Dagga Marl and Thrackan Sal-Solo|}} Marl and Sal-Solo were both captured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at the [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|Battle of Ylesia]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'', which includes the [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|Battle of Ylesia]] and [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s use of "Dagga Farglblag," to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. Assuming the mantle of Ludus Fazum, the Peace Brigade leader claimed himself and his companion to be a couple who were [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] from the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]''—Based on corresponding data for [[Falleen system/Legends|Falleen system]] of [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]] that were taken to the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] world''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] to work as house [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]; Sal-Solo had, in fact, been appointed [[President of Ylesia]] by the invading [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The ruse failed when Sal-Solo's cousin and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] arrived on the scene and arrested Sal-Solo and Marl. ==Behind the scenes== Dagga Marl appeared in [[Walter Jon Williams]]' [[2002]] [[eBook]], ''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dagga Marl |es=Dagga Marl }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Marl, Dagga}} [[Category:Bodyguards]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Peace Brigaders]]
